creator: seschwar@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 192961
notmuch-0.26.2.diff

Recently notmuch 0.26.2 was released, which fixes a few bugs: https://notmuchmail.org/pipermail/notmuch/2018/026473.html

As for changes in the port: The sources are now fetched over HTTPS.

The port builds cleanly under Poudriere on FreeBSD:11:amd64.
